title: Programmer Art PVP Overlay
description: Inspired by Theobald's Barebones pvp overlay, this is a new pack focused on the original programmer art texture pack.
body: Inspired by Theobald's Barebones PVP Overlay. This one is similar but for the original programmer art textures. It includes new textures fit to the old texture style with other textures optimized for pvp.
